title: Fix M-004 defects D1-D3 + independent re-verification -> final VERDICT
objective: Fix the three material/minor M-004 defects (D1 stale runbook, D2 real-channel not fail-closed before navigation, D3 --session unexercised), then run a fresh INDEPENDENT non-producer N=3 verification panel + synthesis that updates VERIFICATION.md to a final PASS/FAIL verdict. D4 (telemetry literal lines) is fixed forward in THIS manager's own handoff only.
constraints: Automated tests + all mission work NEVER contact chatgpt.com/openai or any external network; loopback/local only. Sole exception: T4a clone venv rebuild may fetch packages from the standard Python index IF offline uv sync fails (record it).

D2 test proves fail-closed WITHOUT real navigation (fake/monkeypatched page; socket guard active). No test/script sets channel=real against real site; selector_maps/real.json stays all-empty fail-closed template.

Never read/store/log credentials, cookies, session tokens, browser-profile contents. Write ONLY inside /home/abhmul/dev/ask-chatgpt (+ tmp/). weak-simplex-conjecture is READ-ONLY (never archive/ or human/). Never write .claude/ or .agents/. Never touch shared agent venv (~/.local/share/agent-python/.venv).
uv sync --all-groups ALWAYS. Serialize pytest. Ephemeral ports. Kill only own processes. NEVER git push. ESTIMATE BEFORE EXECUTE.
T1/T2/T3 edit the shared tree -> SERIALIZE (single editor at a time). Commit per leg, prefix 'M-005:'.
T4 panel workers are FRESH and INDEPENDENT (none of T1-T3). T4a produces authoritative evidence ONCE; T4b/T4c reason over it (do NOT each re-run the heavy suite). T4d synthesizes after both.
RIGOR: producer never self-verifies; re-derive every claim from ground truth; verify shipment (durable artifact) not liveness; workers inherit nothing (contracts fully self-contained).

ground_truth_anchors.cli_help_captured: ask-chatgpt flags: prompt, --prompt, --session ID, --model-settings JSON, --files PATH, --dirs PATH, --out FILE, --apply|--dry-run, --root DIR, --channel {real,mock}, --base-url URL, --profile-path PATH, --timeout SECONDS. NO subcommands; NO --profile/--patch-out/--bundle/apply-patch.
ground_truth_anchors.real_error_names: errors.py: AskChatGPTError, LoginRequiredError, SessionNotFoundError, ModelUnavailableError, ResponseTruncatedError, RateLimitedError, SelectorUnavailableError, UploadUnsupportedError, DownloadUnsupportedError, PatchBundleValidationError, PatchMalformedError, BundleIntegrityError, OversizedPayloadError, PathEscapeError, PatchApplyError. NO PatchBundleMalformedError/PatchBundleIntegrityError/PatchBundleTooLargeError/PatchPathEscapeError.
ground_truth_anchors.d2_site: driver.py start() lines 75-91: sync_playwright().start() (78) -> branch real -> _start_real_context() launch_persistent_context (83/275) -> page.goto(self._base_url) (90) where _base_url==REAL_BASE_URL==https://chatgpt.com (34,290). NO selector readiness check before nav. selector_map.py SelectorMap.selector() (31-32) already raises SelectorUnavailableError on empty; real.json all-empty.
ground_truth_anchors.d3_site: cli.py:102 defines --session ID; cli.py:63 passes session_identifier=args.session. No test/script exercises it. Library continuity proof to mirror: tests/test_ask_chatgpt_uc1.py. accept scripts: scripts/accept_uc3.{sh,py}. Console entry: pyproject.toml [project.scripts] ask-chatgpt=ask_chatgpt.cli:main.
